title: Completed Local Studio Config Navigation Adapter
summary: Completed Phase 2 of the local Studio app migration by expanding the runtime config contract and adding a small vanilla JavaScript adapter for view navigation, transitional URL state, return context, and modal dispatch.
effect: Migrated Studio views now have a Jekyll-free runtime contract for view metadata, service endpoints, data paths, media/thumb bases, pipeline variants, modal dispatch, and transitional state. The adapter preserves vanilla module reuse without introducing a route framework or frontend rewrite.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched local Studio app modules and smoke tests
